steps.title: Identify the key to answering the goal
steps.content: The phrase “detailed overview of the structures” signals that the answer must comprehensively describe Keet Seel's physical/architectural features—not just one element, not the history or builders, but the actual structures themselves.

steps.title: Find the answer that covers all the architectural details
steps.content: C encompasses the full range of structural information provided in the notes. The other three either focus narrowly on a single element, redirect to historical context, or provide only partial information. That matches choice C — C is correct.
